logic_order: collect wellness goals and symptom domains
collect hormone-axis, metabolic, and safety labs or flag missing data
run fertility, prostate/PSA, hematocrit, CV/BP, OSA/LUTS gates
if testosterone eligibility is incomplete, route to evaluation + foundational optimization
if symptoms/signs and repeated morning testosterone pattern align, provider may consider testosterone optimization pathway
if fertility is desired, route to fertility-preserving pathway instead of automatic exogenous testosterone
always attach nutrition, exercise, supplement, sleep, and metabolic optimization plan
monitor response and discontinue/review if no meaningful benefit or safety issue emerges
